evaluation_methodology.adversarial_construction: Snippets use real-world API idioms, complex control flow, domain-specific macros. None are in canonical litmus test form.
evaluation_methodology.statistical_tests: Wilson score 95% confidence intervals for all rates

original_15_snippet_context.note: The original paper reported 14/15 (93.3%) with GPT-4.1 on the initial 15-snippet adversarial set. The extended 50-snippet evaluation uses a superset of those categories with harder, more diverse snippets.
